findings.description: Mary (McAndrew) Mogan and her husband John Mogan had a son who is not yet in the tree: John A Morgan (Morgan/Mogan spellings vary for this family), born 6 March 1873 in Detroit, Wayne County, Michigan — three years before Thomas Frank Mogan (b. 1876), previously the couple's eldest known child.

target_person.name: John A Morgan
target_person.birth: 6 March 1873, Detroit, Wayne, Michigan, United States

supporting_sources: Michigan, Births and Christenings, 1775-1995 — entry for John A Morgan, born 6 Mar 1873, Detroit; parents John Morgan and Mary Morgan
